title: The Armies Assemble
subtitle: Stand where the opposing forces gathered before battle.

sequence.title: Stand with the Irish
sequence.instruction: Place Brian Boru and the Irish camp on the grass, then step beside the group.

sequence.title: Walk to the seawall
sequence.text: Point your phone toward Dublin Bay when you reach the viewing position.

sequence.title: The Viking Fleet Arrives
sequence.instruction: Place the fleet offshore and move your phone slowly to frame the longships across the bay.

title: Brian Boru and His Council
subtitle: Enter the final council before the battle.

sequence.title: The War Council
sequence.instruction: Place Brian and his commanders into the landscape.

sequence.title: The Battle Lines
sequence.instruction: Place the opposing formations on open ground.

title: Aftermath and Legacy
subtitle: Discover how the battle reshaped Ireland.

sequence.title: Legacy of Clontarf
sequence.instruction: Place the final commemorative scene into the landscape.
